name: create_text_post
description: Publish a text-only post to LinkedIn on behalf of the authenticated member or an organization page. Supports hashtags, mentions, and visibility settings.

parameters.name: author
parameters.description: URN of the post author. Use urn:li:person:{id} for members or urn:li:organization:{id} for company pages.

parameters.name: commentary
parameters.description: The text content of the post. Supports @mentions using @[Name](urn:li:organization:{id}) and hashtags using #keyword.
parameters.example: Excited to share our latest milestone! #innovation

parameters.name: visibility
parameters.description: Post visibility: PUBLIC (visible to everyone) or CONNECTIONS (visible to connections only).

body.author: urn:li:person:yrZCpj2Z12
body.commentary: Excited to share our latest milestone! #innovation
